mnemonics.title: BLEU
mnemonics.content: Bilingual Evaluation Understudy - Think of a blue ribbon for best translation quality

mnemonics.title: NMT
mnemonics.content: Neural Machine Translation: Never Make Terrible translations (with neural networks)

acronyms.usage: Core NLP task for language conversion

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a spotlight highlighting relevant words in source sentence during translation
Picture a funnel (encoder) compressing meaning, then a reverse funnel (decoder) expanding to target language

analogies.analogy: Like a bilingual expert rapidly translating a document while maintaining context
Similar to keeping multiple possible translation paths open, like exploring different route options in GPS
